posts.text:
🚨🇮🇷🇺🇸 US-IRAN TALKS ARE NOT OVER

Pakistan’s Foreign Minister has confirmed negotiations between US/Iran will continue, and talks are not over as both sides are still discussing demands.

This comes after JD Vance said talks ended without an agreement, and US left proposal.
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: Targeting civilians “has become an essential component of the strategy” of Burkina Faso’s brutal president, argues one of the authors of a Human Rights Watch report https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/04/09/burkina-fasos-government-is-committing-war-crimes?taid=69db2b8a2dba0d00016aee35&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
US stock market concentration is easing:

The top 10 stocks now reflect ~37% of the S&P 500 market cap, the lowest since Q2 2025.

This percentage has fallen -5 points for its high, posting the biggest drop since the 2022 bear market.

However, it is still 10 percentage points higher above the 2000 Dot-Com Bubble peak.

To put this into perspective, the top 10 companies made up just ~22% of the S&P 500 at the beginning of 2020.

This comes as 6 of the Magnificent 7 stocks have entered a correction, with META, $META, and Microsoft, $MSFT, effectively trading in a bear market.

The average stock is now outperforming Big Tech.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
